Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class WaveXmdFormattingProperty

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.WaveXmdFormattingProperty
public class WaveXmdFormattingProperty extends Object

Java class for WaveXmdFormattingProperty complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WaveXmdFormattingProperty">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="formattingBins" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdFormattingBin" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formattingPredicates" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdFormattingPredicate" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="property" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="referenceField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="sortIndex" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getFormattingBins

      public List<WaveXmdFormattingBin> getFormattingBins()
      Gets the value of the formattingBins property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the formattingBins property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFormattingBins().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list WaveXmdFormattingBin

      Returns:
      The value of the formattingBins property.

    • getFormattingPredicates

      public List<WaveXmdFormattingPredicate> getFormattingPredicates()
      Gets the value of the formattingPredicates property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the formattingPredicates property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFormattingPredicates().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list WaveXmdFormattingPredicate

      Returns:
      The value of the formattingPredicates property.
